resonance_events.excerpt: I knew how powerful the Pythia was — she decided the fates of nations.
resonance_events.notes: quote; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: A huge serpent, named Python, guarded the spot before it was slain.
resonance_events.notes: quote; DP-002: treat as reported/subjective unless measured.

resonance_events.excerpt: Tell the king, the cunningly-built hall has fallen in the dust.

resonance_events.excerpt: Atmosphäre der antiken Pilgerfahrt wird durch die moderne Anreise (Tourbusse) kontrastiert und dennoch emotional nachempfunden.
